capacity: 50,000 lbs max (capacity dependent on lift capacity); 15,000 lbs with optional slider arm attachment

installation_requirements.welding_spec: AWS E-70XX electrodes or E-70TI Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Track-assisted operation - rides along lift tracks
50,000 lb maximum capacity (dependent on lift capacity)
Height adapters included as standard: (2) 5-inch, (2) 7.5-inch, and (2) 10-inch
Adjustable width from 12 inches minimum to 32 inches maximum
Adjustable length from 43.5 inches minimum to 59.25 inches maximum

optional_equipment.note: Re-rates jacking beam to 15,000 lb capacity when installed
